assessment_items.question_content:
***Spiral Jetty's* monumental scale and natural form recall the earthworks of [[☃ dropdown 1]], which are still visible today.**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5ad365dfadfcf30f4ac3fb70b56fe0b9.jpg)
hints:
**Spiral Jetty's monumental scale and natural form recall the earthworks of ancient civilizations, which are still visible today.**  

**[Watch this video to review](https://www.khanacademy.org/humanities/art-history/art-history-1960---age-of-post-colonialism/minimalism/v/smithson--spiral-jetty--1970)**

assessment_items.question_content:
**Spiral Jetty could also be considered  [[☃ dropdown 1]] because it continues to change in response to its natural environment.** 


![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5ad365dfadfcf30f4ac3fb70b56fe0b9.jpg)
hints:
**Spiral Jetty could also be considered "Process Art" because it continues to change in response to its natural environment.**  

**[Watch this video to review](https://www.khanacademy.org/humanities/art-history/art-history-1960---age-of-post-colonialism/minimalism/v/smithson--spiral-jetty--1970)**

assessment_items.question_content:
**Smithson and other artists who make site-specific Environmental or Land Art embrace the idea that art can be contained by a gallery or museum context.**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5ad365dfadfcf30f4ac3fb70b56fe0b9.jpg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
**Smithson and other artists who make site-specific Environmental or Land Art question the idea that art can be contained by a gallery or museum context.**

**[Watch this video to review](https://www.khanacademy.org/humanities/art-history/art-history-1960---age-of-post-colonialism/minimalism/v/smithson--spiral-jetty--1970)**

assessment_items.question_content:
**Smithson's use of industrial construction techniques and the role of many people to create *Spiral Jetty* rejects the notion of a single artist-creator.** 

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5ad365dfadfcf30f4ac3fb70b56fe0b9.jpg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
**Smithson's use of industrial construction techniques and the role of many people to create *Spiral Jett*y rejects the notion of a single artist-creator.** 

**[Watch this video to review](https://www.khanacademy.org/humanities/art-history/art-history-1960---age-of-post-colonialism/minimalism/v/smithson--spiral-jetty--1970)**
